calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Dec-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER HANNA's Motion To Dismiss.

Plaintiff Christopher Hanna's unopposed Motion to Dismiss is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing and the settlement agreement in Gonzalez v. Blue Link Wireless, LLC, CGC-24-614396 having been approved, the court dismisses Plaintiff's individual PAGA claim, if any, with prejudice and dismisses Plaintiff's representative PAGA claim without prejudice. Parties to bear their own fees and costs.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Continued To Jan-21-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-15-2025 Set For Case Management Conference On Nov-19-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Joint Motion To Stay Paga Action Pending Settlement Discussions
Off Calendar Sep-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BLUE LINK WIRELESS, LLC, SAAD NADHIR Joint Motion To Stay Paga Action Pending Settlement Discussions

The Parties' Joint Motion To Stay PAGA Action Pending Settlement Discussions is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

Good cause appearing, this action is stayed until December 15, 2025, unless the court rules otherwise before that date.

To the extent the parties seek additional or different relief, the motion is denied.

Order signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
